title: Should The Children Be Paid
wikitext:
[]: Should The Children Be Paid? Post by Soljer13 » Sun Oct 05, 2008 10:51 am Just a thought. IF the Children were Paid, what would be there average Income?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Oct 05, 2008 10:54 am I think there has been a thread on this sort of topic before, but the search function is currently failing me. Seeing that Misato is fairly cash-strapped (after making the payments on her car), I would expect the Children to only get pocket-money sort of allowances over and above subsistence (food and lodgings provided as part of the package).

[]: Post by AnnieZ » Sun Oct 05, 2008 10:55 am Harry Potter actors are PAID. Evangelion children are much more important than Harry potter actors. So, Eva-kids should be paid better than Dan, Emma and Rupert. :( Those three don't fight Angels.

[]: Post by Soljer13 » Sun Oct 05, 2008 10:57 am Shinji's a minimalist so he probably not use his money, and/or give it to Misato after her "coercing" him. Said money for Booze. And when Asuka came, she'd take his money for shopping.

[]: Post by AnnieZ » Sun Oct 05, 2008 10:58 am Shinji should buy an Ipod.

[]: Post by Soljer13 » Sun Oct 05, 2008 11:02 am na, Shinji's to LAEM to do such a thing. REBUILD Shinji probably has a PSP from the Year 2015. And Manga Shinji is soo Bad Ass, Music Plays in his Ears. Out of Fear.

[]: Post by AnnieZ » Sun Oct 05, 2008 11:03 am I want to offer a new pair of All Starts to Shinji.... poor guy.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Oct 05, 2008 11:04 am NERV seems to have most of its budget going on equipment (with grumblings from the Committee about how much that is). Salaries -- as opposed to payment in kind -- are probably pared to the bone. If Rei had any significant budget allocated to her, she surely wouldn't be stuck in that grotty old high-rise, that looks like a survivor from c1960. As for Shinji's personal electronics -- 2I put technological development back and onto a slightly different path.

[]: Post by AnnieZ » Sun Oct 05, 2008 11:07 am Remember that train scene with the Vice-Commander, and Maya, Aoba and Makoto with their stinky clothes heading to the laundry? I've always asked myself. They are from an organization that saves the world everybady, so, they should have a personal laundry @ their homes. AND, TRAVELLING BY TRAIN? Becose of the 2nd Impact consequences, petrolium became even MORE EXPENSIVE and it is today? Or... being poor is a way of keeping attentions away from them from those super random and secret organizations agains the Nerv guys? : |

[]: Post by Soljer13 » Sun Oct 05, 2008 11:08 am about the 2I Impact on economy/Electronics, true. But Onething that boggles me. If That was the Impact in The Economy(were talking world Wide Depression) How the fuck did they Fund an Evangelion!? In real Life there's Probably not enough toBuild half of One!

[]: Post by AnnieZ » Sun Oct 05, 2008 11:11 am How they fund the Evangelions? They stole the Swiss Banks. Even after the 2nd Impact, there is still lots of people with lots of money. They even made more money by lending it to other countries to reconstruct. That's what USA made with the European Countries after the World Wars. That was one of the factors of USA economic growing.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Oct 05, 2008 11:11 am Like most SF, a lot of NGE is about the time and place it was written -- NERV is very much like a struggling business in the 1995 Japanese economy; the lifestyles of the lower ranking cast are the sort of thing that would be familiar to the intended audience.

[]: Post by NemZ » Sun Oct 05, 2008 11:32 am I imagine that the UN has established trust funds or some such for the children to compensate them... but knowing that win or lose the world is doomed anyway, it's a very empty promise. Misato most likely received a bonus stipend to house and feed the pilots, though it would not surprise me to learn she spent most of the extra income on booze.

[]: Post by Kyoko Sano » Sun Oct 05, 2008 11:47 am I'd pay Shinji. Personally.

[]: Post by BobBQ » Sun Oct 05, 2008 11:56 am Nerv can't afford guns, let alone butter.

[]: Post by Kyoko Sano » Sun Oct 05, 2008 11:59 am JSSDF Soldier in the Cafeteria: I cant Believe there's No BUTTER!

[]: Post by Ornette » Sun Oct 05, 2008 12:00 pm http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3899 also http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2742 Note - if there are positive contributions to a topic, necromancy is encouraged.
